en: Now when David and his men came to Ziklag on the third day, the Amalekites had made a raid against the Negeb and against Ziklag. They had overcome Ziklag and burned it with fire
zh: 第三天，大衛和跟隨他的人到了洗革拉。那時亞瑪力人襲擊了南地和洗革拉。他們攻破了洗革拉，又放火焚燒。

en: and taken captive the women and all who were in it, both small and great. They killed no one, but carried them off and went their way.
zh: 他們把城裡的婦女，無論大小都擄走了 。他們沒有殺人，都帶著他們從原路回去了。

en: And when David and his men came to the city, they found it burned with fire, and their wives and sons and daughters taken captive.
zh: 大衛和跟隨他的人到了那城，看見城已經被火燒毀，他們的妻子、兒女都被擄走了，

en: Then David and the people who were with him raised their voices and wept until they had no more strength to weep.
zh: 就放聲大哭，直哭到沒有力氣再哭。

en: David's two wives also had been taken captive, Ahinoam of Jezreel and Abigail the widow of Nabal of Carmel.
zh: 大衛的兩個妻子，耶斯列人亞希暖和作過拿八妻子的迦密人亞比該，也都被擄去了。

en: And David was greatly distressed, for the people spoke of stoning him, because all the people were bitter in soul, each for his sons and daughters. But David strengthened himself in the LORD his God.
zh: 大衛處境非常困難，因為眾人都為自己的兒女心中苦惱，說要用石頭打死大衛；但大衛靠著耶和華他的 神堅強起來。

en: And David said to Abiathar the priest, the son of Ahimelech, "Bring me the ephod." So Abiathar brought the ephod to David.
zh: 大衛對亞希米勒的兒子、亞比亞他祭司說：“請你把以弗得帶到我這裡來。”亞比亞他就把以弗得帶到大衛那裡去。

en: And David inquired of the LORD, "Shall I pursue after this band? Shall I overtake them?" He answered him, "Pursue, for you shall surely overtake and shall surely rescue."
zh: 大衛求問耶和華說：“我可以追趕這群匪徒嗎？我可以追上他們嗎？”耶和華回答他：“你可以追趕，你必定追上，也必定把一切救回來。”

en: So David set out, and the six hundred men who were with him, and they came to the brook Besor, where those who were left behind stayed.
zh: 於是大衛和跟隨他的六百人出發。他們到了比梭溪，有些跟不上的就留在那裡。

en: But David pursued, he and four hundred men. Two hundred stayed behind, who were too exhausted to cross the brook Besor.
zh: 有二百人太疲乏，不能渡過比梭溪，就留在那裡，大衛和四百人繼續追趕。

en: They found an Egyptian in the open country and brought him to David. And they gave him bread and he ate. They gave him water to drink,
zh: 他們在田野裡遇見一個埃及人，就把他帶到大衛那裡。他們給他飯吃，又給他水喝。

en: and they gave him a piece of a cake of figs and two clusters of raisins. And when he had eaten, his spirit revived, for he had not eaten bread or drunk water for three days and three nights.
zh: 又給他一塊無花果餅，兩個葡萄餅。他吃了，精神就恢復過來，因為他已經三天三夜沒有吃東西，沒有喝水了。

en: And David said to him, "To whom do you belong? And where are you from?" He said, "I am a young man of Egypt, servant to an Amalekite, and my master left me behind because I fell sick three days ago.
zh: 大衛問他：“你是屬誰的？你從哪裡來？”他回答：“我是個埃及的青年人，是亞瑪力人的奴僕。因為我三天前病了，我的主人就把我丟棄了。

en: We had made a raid against the Negeb of the Cherethites and against that which belongs to Judah and against the Negeb of Caleb, and we burned Ziklag with fire."
zh: 我們侵襲了基利提的南方和屬猶大地的南方，以及迦勒地的南方，又用火燒了洗革拉。”

en: And David said to him, "Will you take me down to this band?" And he said, "Swear to me by God that you will not kill me or deliver me into the hands of my master, and I will take you down to this band."
zh: 大衛對他說：“你願意帶我下到那一群匪徒那裡嗎？”他回答：“如果你指著 神向我起誓，不殺死我，也不把我交在我主人手裡，我就帶你下到那一群匪徒那裡去。”

en: And when he had taken him down, behold, they were spread abroad over all the land, eating and drinking and dancing, because of all the great spoil they had taken from the land of the Philistines and from the land of Judah.
zh: 他帶大衛下去。匪徒們都分散在各處，正在吃喝、跳舞，因為他們從非利士地和猶大地搶來的戰利品很多。

en: And David struck them down from twilight until the evening of the next day, and not a man of them escaped, except four hundred young men, who mounted camels and fled.
zh: 大衛擊殺他們，從黃昏直到次日的晚上。除了四百個騎駱駝的年輕人逃跑了以外，他們當中一個人也沒有逃脫。

en: David recovered all that the Amalekites had taken, and David rescued his two wives.
zh: 亞瑪力人搶去的一切，大衛都救回來了，也救回了他的兩個妻子。

en: Nothing was missing, whether small or great, sons or daughters, spoil or anything that had been taken. David brought back all.
zh: 無論大小，不分男女，無論是他們搶來的，或是被人擄去的，大衛都奪回來，沒有失落一樣。

en: David also captured all the flocks and herds, and the people drove the livestock before him, and said, "This is David's spoil."
zh: 大衛奪了所有的羊群和牛群，跟從大衛的人把牠們趕到原有的群畜面前，說：“這是大衛的戰利品。”

en: Then David came to the two hundred men who had been too exhausted to follow David, and who had been left at the brook Besor. And they went out to meet David and to meet the people who were with him. And when David came near to the people he greeted them.
zh: 大衛來到那二百人那裡，那些人因太疲乏不能跟隨大衛去，而留在比梭溪旁；他們出來迎接大衛和跟隨他的眾人。大衛接近眾人的時候，就向他們問安。

en: Then all the wicked and worthless fellows among the men who had gone with David said, "Because they did not go with us, we will not give them any of the spoil that we have recovered, except that each man may lead away his wife and children, and depart."
zh: 與大衛一起去的那些人中，有些惡人和流氓說：“他們沒有和我們一起去，我們就不把奪回來的戰利品分給他們，只把他們各人的妻子和兒子還給他們，讓他們領回去就是了。”

en: But David said, "You shall not do so, my brothers, with what the LORD has given us. He has preserved us and given into our hand the band that came against us.
zh: 大衛說：“兄弟們，耶和華賜給我們的，你們不可以這樣作。他保護了我們，又把那些攻擊我們的匪徒交在我們手裡。

en: Who would listen to you in this matter? For as his share is who goes down into the battle, so shall his share be who stays by the baggage. They shall share alike."
zh: 這事誰要聽從你們呢？下戰場的得多少，留守武器的也得多少，應當大家平分。”

en: And he made it a statute and a rule for Israel from that day forward to this day.
zh: 從那天起，大衛定此為以色列的律例典章，直到今日。

en: When David came to Ziklag, he sent part of the spoil to his friends, the elders of Judah, saying, "Here is a present for you from the spoil of the enemies of the LORD."
zh: 大衛到了洗革拉，就從戰利品中取一部分送給他的朋友、猶大的長老，說：“看哪，這是從耶和華的仇敵那裡得來的戰利品，送給你們作禮物。”

en: It was for those in Bethel, in Ramoth of the Negeb, in Jattir,
zh: 他送禮物給在伯特利的、在南地拉末的、在雅提珥的、

en: in Aroer, in Siphmoth, in Eshtemoa,
zh: 在亞羅珥的、在息末的、在以實提莫的、

en: in Racal, in the cities of the Jerahmeelites, in the cities of the Kenites,
zh: 在拉哈勒的、在耶拉蔑各城的、在基尼各城的、

en: in Hormah, in Bor-ashan, in Athach,
zh: 在何珥瑪的、在歌拉珊的、在亞撻的、

en: in Hebron, for all the places where David and his men had roamed.
zh: 在希伯崙的人，又送給一切大衛及其跟隨者所到過之地的人。
